headline: Airline stocks hit turbulence amid Mideast conflict: Latest news
summary: US airline stocks faced slight headwinds in Wednesday's trading session in response to the recent escalations between the US and Iran, compounded by the jolt in oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F). Market Domination Overtime Host Josh Lipton is joined by Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Pras Subramanian for a chat about the latest headlines emerging from the airline industry today, including United Airlines' (UAL) new headphone rule and the airport lounge American Express (AXP) opened in Las Vegas. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

headline: Old Dominion Unveils Weak LTL Unit Performance for February
summary: ODFL's revenues per day fall 3.3% year over year in February 2026, owing to 6.8% decrease in LTL tons per day, partially offset by an increase in LTL revenue per hundredweight.

raw.headline: Old Dominion Unveils Weak LTL Unit Performance for February
raw.summary: ODFL's revenues per day fall 3.3% year over year in February 2026, owing to 6.8% decrease in LTL tons per day, partially offset by an increase in LTL revenue per hundredweight.

headline: Ryanair's Traffic Numbers for February 2026 Improve Year Over Year
summary: RYAAY's passengers rise 6% year over year to 13.3M in February 2026, with load factor flat year over year at 92%.

raw.headline: Ryanair's Traffic Numbers for February 2026 Improve Year Over Year

headline: TD Cowen Upgrades Southwest Airlines Co. (LUV) to Buy and Raises its Price Target to $66
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) is among the 15 Best Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 10 Years. On February 27, 2026, TD Cowen upgraded Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) to Buy from Hold and raised its price target to $66 from $50. The firm said airline demand is strengthening in 2026 against what it […]
